notes:
Whenever starting the game the first time, whatever it is steam is trying to install as a first time setup causes it to complain that windows media player 7 is unavailable, however the game still works without it being addressed.

Proton 3.16-6:
The menu stutters and lags so hard you can barely select the menus, and in-game there are several game breaking fps drops.

Proton 3.6-8:
Alt Tabbing causes the game to crash.

Mild fps drops here and there, but it is playable.
title: Call of Cthulhu®: Dark Corners of the Earth

notes: При первом запуске во время установки фреймворков и всякой редиски ругнулся на Windows Media Player 7.0 - Microsoft Windows Media Player 7.0 or greater is required for this installation. Please install его и попробуй по новой, но я просто нажал OK и продолжил - игра работала и без всякой установки этого плеера.
title: Call of Cthulhu®: Dark Corners of the Earth

notes: Runs great out of the box... has a couple little audio hickups,... but I cant tell if that is just from the noraml buggy game itself.  The only real problem I have is that when I alt-tab out of the game and then go back into the game it ALWAYS crashes.    That is rather annoying.
title: Call of Cthulhu®: Dark Corners of the Earth
